{{Quote|My husband is innocent- please don't let him go to jail for a crime he didn't commit!|Elora to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and [[Jolee Bindo]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Elora''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who lived on [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. She was the longtime [[Marriage/Legends|wife]] of the crippled former [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] and war hero [[Sunry]].

==Biography==
When Elora discovered the affair that [[Sunry]] had been having with the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Elassa Huros]], she convinced him to abandon it, and the two attempted to work things out. When Sunry was accused of murdering Elassa, she tried to contact anyone who could help, including Sunry's old friend [[Jolee Bindo]], who was traveling with [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] at the time. When the party arrived in [[Ahto City]], she asked Revan, whom she recognized as being a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], to become Sunry's [[Arbiter/Legends|arbiter]] in the hopes of proving the man innocent.

==Behind the scenes==
Elora only appears if the player has Jolee in the party or if they have met with [[Davin Kotras]] in a [[Spaceport/Legends|starport]] after landing on a [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

==Appearances==
